overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city center featuring a massive holographic koi fish swimming between neon-lit skyscrapers. The scene transitions from an open street with towering digital advertisements into a covered highway underpass with dynamic colored lighting installations.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with holographic advertisement display

events.description: holographic koi fish swims from right to left across the field of view between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the neon-lit city street, observing the massive holographic fish advertisement overhead

entered.detail: giant glowing orange-red holographic fish with flowing fins swimming through the air between buildings
tall black skyscraper with prominent vertical yellow neon strip lighting
massive dark glass facade skyscraper with scattered illuminated windows
elevated highway overpass with blue neon accent lights on support columns
tall building covered in bright digital advertisements and vertical neon signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through an open downtown street surrounded by towering futuristic skyscrapers adorned with neon lights. A massive holographic koi fish swims overhead from right to left, glowing orange-red against the night sky. The camera approaches an elevated concrete overpass ahead while passing the neon-lit building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane underpass entrance with merging traffic

events.description: holographic fish exits view left and camera enters the covered underpass beneath the elevated highway
white van ahead slows down as traffic navigates under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: following traffic flow under the elevated highway, slowing down behind the white van ahead

notable_agents.action: white cargo van driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: white commercial delivery van with illuminated red tail lights
curved wall under the overpass with large panels displaying shifting neon colors
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The holographic fish disappears from view as the camera enters the sheltered underpass beneath the elevated highway. A white cargo van is directly ahead with brake lights on, navigating the moderate traffic. The left side reveals a curved wall with colorful illuminated panels, while the sky becomes mostly obscured by the concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with dynamic lighting installation

events.description: illuminated wall panels shift from green-cyan to vibrant pink and purple hues
wall panels cycle back to green and cyan colors creating a dynamic light show

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive through the underpass, passing the colorful illuminated walls while maintaining steady speed

segments.scene_description: Driving deeper under the overpass where the sky is completely obscured by concrete. The left wall features prominent illuminated panels that cycle through vibrant colors including green, cyan, pink, and purple. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the multi-lane road ahead as other vehicles navigate the covered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from an open, neon-lit cyberpunk downtown into the enclosed, rhythmic lighting of a covered highway underpass. It begins on a wide street surrounded by towering skyscrapers, where a massive orange-red holographic koi fish swims overhead across the night sky. As the camera approaches an elevated concrete overpass, the holographic fish disappears from view and the open sky is gradually obscured by the heavy structure. The scene then shifts into the sheltered underpass, following a white cargo van through moderate traffic while the environment narrows. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the covered corridor, where the lighting transforms into vibrant, cycling panels of green, cyan, pink, and purple along the walls under a ceiling of fluorescent lights.
